command:
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=10 jose@192.168.0.199 bash << 'REMOTE'
echo "=== Search ENTIRE openclaw install + config + workspace for spam strings ==="
echo "--- searching for 'A_ToolsX' / 'ToolsX' / 'join our channel' / 't.me/A_' ---"
grep -rli "A_ToolsX\|ToolsX\|join our channel\|t.me/A_\|join.*channel.*to use" \
  /home/jose/.openclaw/ \
  /home/jose/.npm-global/lib/node_modules/openclaw/ \
  2>/dev/null | head -20

echo ""
echo "--- broader: any file mentioning 'must join' or 'VIEW CHANNEL' ---"
grep -rli "must join\|VIEW CHANNEL\|to use this bot" \
  /home/jose/.openclaw/ 2>/dev/null | head -15

echo ""
echo "=== List installed openclaw plugins/skills (where malware would hide) ==="
ls -la /home/jose/.openclaw/plugins/ 2>/dev/null
echo "--- skills ---"
ls -la /home/jose/.openclaw/skills/ 2>/dev/null
echo "--- workspace scripts ---"
ls -la /home/jose/.openclaw/workspace/scripts/ 2>/dev/null | head -15

echo ""
echo "=== Recently modified files in openclaw (last 7 days) - injection candidates ==="
find /home/jose/.openclaw/ -type f -mtime -7 2>/dev/null | grep -vE "\.log$|/logs/|spool|\.db$|cache" | head -25
REMOTE
